name: Gem
description: Cut stones on a jeweler’s velvet — every gem re-facets itself, its table flashing white where the light lands.

code.style: --jewel: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --glint: @rand(0.25, 0.5); --rule: ( /* stone and table share one emitted tilt so the cut reads as one */ --gt: @r(-16deg, 16deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; top: 14%; width: 68%; height: 72%; background: var(--jewel); clip-path: polygon(@rand(24%, 34%) 0%, @rand(66%, 76%) 0%, 100% @rand(28%, 38%), 50% 100%, 0% @rand(28%, 38%)); transform: rotate(@var(--gt)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 34%; top: 14%; width: 32%; height: 26%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1); opacity: var(--glint); clip-path: polygon(20% 0%, 80% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); transform: rotate(@var(--gt)); transform-origin: 50% 138%; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
